name: Old Ranch Golf Practice Center
about: Old Ranch Country Club is a private country club in Seal Beach, California, offering an 18-hole, par-72 championship golf course designed by Ted Robinson. The 6,932-yard course is situated on 128 acres of lakes and tree-lined fairways, with no homes in sight. The club provides a family-friendly atmosphere and hosts various social events, golf tournaments, and member gatherings. Amenities include a newly renovated clubhouse with casual dining, a swimming pool, and a state-of-the-art fitness center. Membership is required for access to the facilities and golf.
why_golfers_like_it: Championship golf course designed by Ted Robinson with pristine bentgrass greens
128-acre course with lakes and tree-lined fairways, no homes in sight
Comprehensive golf instruction and club fitting services available for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Available at the clubhouse with fresh, seasonal cuisine

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs to play or practice?
faq.answer: As a private country club, members can use their own clubs or have access to club fitting services to find the right equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The clubhouse offers fresh, seasonal cuisine and libations. Food and drink policies for events should be confirmed with the event sales team.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes on the championship course will vary depending on the pace of play and time of day. Members can inquire with the pro shop for typical playing times.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Old Ranch Country Club is family-friendly and offers junior programming, family activities, and youth golf lessons such as the Crush It! program.
